summary:
The investigation focuses on how drug X promotes cell cycle progression by activating CDK4, leading to phosphorylation and inactivation of the Rb tumor suppressor protein. This results in release of E2F transcription factors that drive cells into the S phase of the cell cycle. 

Is this summary accurate? Yes
Do we need any changes or additions?

No further edits needed — the summary accurately captures the core mechanism linking drug X → CDK4 activation → Rb inhibition → E2F liberation → S-phase entry without introducing unsupported details.
